prestazioni: Audi-sourced 6.0L W12 engine (code: **BCY**) upgraded with a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ W12 supercharger kit** (1.5 bar boost, 850+ HP), featuring a **custom billet crankshaft** and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (10.5:1 compression ratio) with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** for extreme cylinder pressure resistance.

**Motec M150 ECU** with **custom W12-specific fuel and ignition maps**, paired with a **Pectel SQ6M+ data logger** for real-time telemetry. **Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors** and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to manage crankcase pressures under forced induction.

**KW Suspensions 3-way Clubsport coilovers** (adjustable compression/rebound, 24-way damping) with **custom Spyker-specific spring rates** (800 lb/in front, 1000 lb/in rear) and **HRE Performance Wheels FF15 forged 3-piece rims** (20x10.5 ET30 front, 21x12.5 ET35 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear). **AP Racing 6-piston monoblock calipers** with **380mm carbon-ceramic rotors** (front) and **4-piston calipers with 356mm rotors** (rear), paired with **Ferodo Racing DS3.12 pads** for endurance-level braking.
estetica: **RML Group carbon fiber widebody conversion kit** (Spyker-licensed, 50mm wider front fenders, 70mm wider rear quarters) with **custom aluminum honeycomb reinforcement** for chassis rigidity. **Vorsteiner carbon fiber front splitter** (Spyker C12-specific, 3-stage adjustable) and **Rear diffuser by Prior Design** (integrated dual 100mm titanium exhaust outlets).

**Bremont Spyker Edition chronograph** (limited to 25 units) integrated into the **carbon fiber dashboard** (replacing the stock analog cluster), paired with **Alcantara-wrapped Recaro Pole Position seats** (carbon fiber shells, 6-point Schroth harnesses). **Custom LED taillight assembly** (OEM Spyker design, upgraded with **Osram Oslon Black Flat LEDs** for 30% brighter output).

**Aeromotions active rear wing** (Spyker C12-specific, 3D-printed titanium endplates, 1200mm span, 3-position adjustability) with **Gurney flap** and **integrated DRS (Drag Reduction System)** for track use. **Full PPF (Paint Protection Film) in XPEL Stealth** applied to the **hand-brushed aluminum body panels** (Spyker’s signature ‘aviation-grade’ finish) to preserve the brushed texture while preventing scratches.
